landing.subtitle: A rotating dinner event where you visit 3 homes and enjoy a different course with new tablemates at each stop.

wizard.title: Organize a Dinner Jump
wizard.policyParticipantsAllowed: Participants can also invite friends (max 5 participants)
wizard.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. A fun dinner through the neighborhood! We eat at each other's homes and meet new people.
wizard.descriptionHelp: This text is shown on the event page and discovery page.
wizard.travelTimeHelp: How much time does a participant need to travel between courses from one location to the next.
wizard.afterpartyHelp: After dessert, everyone can meet up at an afterparty location. This can be at someone's home, a café, community center, etc.
wizard.welcomeCardHelp: Send a physical welcome card to all participants. This feature will be added later.

registration.title: Sign up
registration.outsideRadius: Your address is outside this event's zone.
registration.waitlisted: You're on the waitlist. {count} more duo needed.
registration.registered: You're signed up! Waiting for the minimum of 9 duos.

invitations.title: Invite someone
invitations.subtitle: Know someone who would enjoy Dinner Jump? Invite them personally.
